text: The boundaries of a border commercial zone may be modified or established only as provided by federal law.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 648. Foreign Commercial Motor Transp.
##### § 648.052 — Modification of Zone Boundaries

The boundaries of a border commercial zone may be modified or established only as provided by federal law.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.35(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: The boundaries of a border commercial zone may be modified or established only as provided by federal law.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.35(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.
